expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜所需板材的尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度]是整体尺寸，[板厚]是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[背景板厚]是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุของแผ่นด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุของแผ่นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước tấm ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của các tấm trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm lưng. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Tuktok, Ibabang, at Gilid na Tabla, [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Background na Tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကေဘိနက်တစ်ခုအတွက် ဘုတ်အဖွဲ့အရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width]၊ [Height]၊ [အနံ]သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်သည်။ [BoardThick]သည်ထိပ်၊ အောက်နှင့်ဘက်ဘိလပ်ပြားပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BackBoardThick]သည်နောက်ခံဘိလပ်ပြားပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាអណ្តាតសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាវាស់ម៉ាកសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជារឹតកម្រាស់សំរាប់ឯកសារកម្មវិធី, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សំរាប់ផ្នែកក្រោយមួយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດໄມ້ສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ຄືຂະຫນາດທັງຫມົດ, [BoardThick] ຄື ຄວາມໜາຄອງສໍາລັບເວັບ ແລະດ້ານຂ້າງຂອງຖານ, [BackBoardThick] ຄື ຄວາມໜາຄອງສໍາລັບພື້ນຫຼັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板サイズを計算します。[Width], [Height], [Depth]は全体の寸法、[BoardThick]は上板、下板、側板の材料の厚さ、[BackBoardThick]は背景板の材料の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 측정값이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재료 두께이며, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los tableros para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son las medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero trasero. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] représentent les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériel des panneaux supérieur, inférieur et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériel du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattenmaße für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, und [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwand. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: एक कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] - толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
